summary: ps_checkout allows unauthorized method invocation through unvalidated parameter
details:
### Impact

Unvalidated parameter can lead to some unauthorized method invocation with very little possibilities.

### Patches

The problem has been patched in versions

- v5.3.0 for PrestaShop 1.7 (build number: 7.5.3.0)
- v5.3.0 for PrestaShop 8 (build number: 8.5.3.0)
- v5.3.0 for PrestaShop 9 (build number: 9.5.3.0)

Read the [Versioning policy](https://github.com/PrestaShopCorp/ps_checkout/wiki/Versioning) to learn more about the build numbers.

### Credits

PrestaShop thanks [PATICEO](https://www.paticeo.com/) for reporting the issue.
